patterns.title: high stress shows compounding symptom progression
patterns.explanation: Symptoms emerged in sequence after high stress: stomach pain, fatigue, headache.

steps: Anchored earliest cause onset.
Ordered downstream symptoms by first occurrence.
Validated staggered onset over multiple weeks.
